hero.label: RELIABLE FREIGHT DISPATCH
hero.title: Moving Your Freight Forward
hero.description: Professional dispatch services for reefer, dry van, flatbed, and car hauling. We keep your loads moving — on time, every time.

about.title: Your Trusted Dispatch Partner
about.paragraph1: At Ned Dispatch, we specialize in connecting carriers with the right loads. With years of experience in freight logistics, we understand what it takes to keep goods moving efficiently across the country.
about.paragraph2: Whether you're hauling temperature-sensitive products in reefers, general cargo in dry vans, vehicles on car haulers, or heavy equipment on flatbeds — we've got the expertise and network to keep your trucks loaded and rolling.

services.name: Reefer
services.description: Temperature-controlled freight for perishables and sensitive cargo. We handle the details so your loads stay on spec.

services.name: Dry Van
services.description: General freight and palletized loads. Reliable dry van dispatch with a network you can count on.

services.name: Car Hauling
services.description: Auto transport and vehicle logistics. From single units to multi-car loads, we keep your haulers moving.

services.name: Flatbed
services.description: Heavy equipment, machinery, and oversized loads. Flatbed expertise and secure, on-time delivery.

testimonials.name: James M.
testimonials.quote: NEDispatch keeps our trucks loaded. Professional, responsive, and they know the lanes. Couldn’t ask for a better partner.

testimonials.name: Sarah K.
testimonials.quote: We switched to NEDispatch last year and our on-time rate went up. They handle the details so we can focus on driving.

trust.label: Proud to work with carriers and shippers nationwide

faq.question: How do I get a quote?
faq.answer: Fill out the contact form below or call us. We’ll get back with rates and options based on your lane, equipment, and timeline.

faq.question: What areas do you cover?
faq.answer: We dispatch loads across all 48 continental US states. Tell us your preferred lanes and we’ll match you with available freight.

faq.question: What equipment do you dispatch?
faq.answer: Reefer, dry van, flatbed, and car hauling. We work with owner-operators and small fleets in each category.

faq.question: How quickly can you find me a load?
faq.answer: Often same day for common lanes. We’ll confirm availability and get you loaded as soon as you’re ready.
